title: toona australis
intro: Toona australis, also known as the Australian cedar or Eastern red cedar, is a species of evergreen tree native to Australia. The medicinal properties of Toona australis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and providing antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Toona australis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, where it is combined with other herbs to create remedies for colds, fever, and other respiratory issues.
